summary: Solid, shippable code. aggregator.py has excellent separation of concerns, type hints, and error handling. Workflow structure is clean. Main issues: (1) actions not pinned to full-length SHA commits (security best practice); (2) run_act_tests.py uses fragile `if 'output' in locals()` pattern (line ~90) instead of initializing variables upfront. Error handling is good, test harness design is sound, and code is readable. Fixtures must exist but aren't shown in review input.
